iAX Dynamics is one of the main and esteemed Regional Distributor of Microsoft Dynamics 365 UAE, IT organization was established in 2003, having branches in UAE (Dubai and Sharjah), KSA, Lebanon.

Iaxdynamics has been a leading Microsoft Dynamics 365 solution supplier along with a host of different software and hardware service in UAE, KSA, Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Ethiopia, Djibouti, Senegal, Guinea, Tanzania, Uganda, Madagascar, Nigeria, Sudan, Somalia, Lebanon, and Jordon.
